description.mysticaleverything.everythin: A catalyst used to create a seed of material.
Place the catalyst on the outer infusion altar, the compression catalyst of the material on the inner infusion altar, and the Prosperity seed base on the central pedestal.
To create a compression catalyst of a material, place the compression catalyst in the center of a crafting table and surround it with 8 essences.
To create a material, craft 9 essences in a crafting table.
